free_text: Measurement of Cu spallation cross sections at IPNS
Intense Pulsed Neutron Source.
Absorbers used to reduce proton energy below 50 MeV.
Stack of 3 copper foils. Only center foil gamma
counted; other foils used to correct for recoil
losses.
Germanium gamma detectors.
Gamma efficiencies determined using NBS Standards.
Beam stopped in Faraday cup.
Decay data taken from Kocher, Radioactive Decay Tables,
Corrected for decay during and after irradiation and
for gamma self-absorption.
Includes uncertainty in  counting
statistics and gamma efficiencies.
Approved by L. Greenwood, 5 August 1999.
VM
